title: Turing Scheme funding outcomes 2025 to 2026
body: "The outcomes of applications to the Turing Scheme for the 2025 to 2026 academic year, detailing the allocation of funds for international study and work placements to successful applicants.  The data provides information about the successful applicants who were assessed according to the assessment criteria set out on Turing Scheme: apply for funding for international placements.  The report is relevant for educational institutions seeking to understand how funding has been distributed. "
